name: Spotify
philosophy: Spotify's web interface is a dark, immersive music player that wraps listeners in a near-black cocoon (#121212, #181818, #1f1f1f) where album art and content become the primary source of color.
trademark_signals: Near-black immersive dark theme (#121212–#1f1f1f) — UI disappears behind content
Spotify Green (#1ed760) as singular brand accent — never decorative, always functional
SpotifyMixUI/CircularSp font family with global script support
Pill buttons (500px–9999px) and circular controls (50%) — rounded, touch-optimized
Uppercase button labels with wide letter-spacing (1.4px–2px)
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use Spotify Green decoratively or on backgrounds
Don't use light backgrounds for primary surfaces
Don't skip the pill/circle geometry on buttons
